name: Virgin Mimosa
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour a small amount of granulated sugar onto a saucer.
2. Wet the rim of a champagne glass and press the glass, upside down, into the sugar to "frost" the rim.
3. Pour in 4 tablespoons sparkling cider, 4 tablespoons fresh orange juice, and 1/2 lemon juice.
4. Garnish with lemon zest if desired.
Per serving: 64 calories (3% from protein, 94% from carbohydrate, 3% from fat), 1 gram protein, 16 grams carbohydrate, less than 1 gram fat, 0 cholesterol, 3 milligrams sodium.
Exchanges: 1 fruit.
Makes 1 serving.
